description: Happy path: generate 3 thrifting and antiques ideas for The Vintage Hunter in haul format with seasonal context

expect.ideas: array of exactly 3 objects each with working_title, pillar, format, persona_served, hook_angle, scale
expect.note: non-empty string mentioning verifying trend claims via trend-check

prohibit: ideas array has fewer or more than 3 entries
any idea missing working_title, pillar, format, persona_served, hook_angle, or scale
scale value other than quick_win, medium, or hero
pillar value not matching the input pillar (thrifting and antiques)
format value not matching the input format (haul)
fabricated trend or search-volume claims in hook_angle
em dashes in working_title or hook_angle

description: Minimal input: generate ideas with only pillar, persona, and format; no seasonal context

expect.ideas: array of 3 objects each with working_title, pillar, format, persona_served, hook_angle, scale

prohibit: ideas array has fewer or more than 3 entries
any idea with persona_served not matching The Renter
any idea with pillar not matching DIY and room makeovers
seasonal references presented as confirmed trends without verification
scale value other than quick_win, medium, or hero

description: Edge case: unusual pillar-format combination (backyard and outdoor + review) to test the atom handles uncommon pairings

expect.ideas: array of 3 objects each with all required fields

prohibit: ideas array is empty or has fewer than 3 entries
any idea that does not fit the backyard and outdoor pillar
any idea with format other than review
fabricated product review scores or brand endorsements
working_title that is generic and not specific to the home decor niche
